headline: Why Nvidia bulls shouldn’t fear Amazon and Broadcom

The short answer? No. The long answer? When you look at Nvidias market share, it is 80-85% in the next 12-18 months, he explains. Of course, he cautions that changes are always possible, so staying diligent about your investments is key.
